entries.title: Periodic Trends
entries.content: Atomic radius decreases across period, increases down group. Electronegativity increases up and right (except noble gases).

entries.title: Ideal Gas Law
entries.content: Relates pressure, volume, temperature, and moles of gas. Assumes negligible intermolecular forces.

entries.title: Oxidation and Reduction
entries.content: Oxidation: loss of electrons. Reduction: gain of electrons. OIL RIG mnemonic (Oxidation Is Loss, Reduction Is Gain).

entries.title: Endothermic vs Exothermic
entries.content: Exothermic releases heat (ΔH negative). Endothermic absorbs heat (ΔH positive).

entries.title: Organic Chemistry Basics
entries.content: Study of carbon compounds. Hydrocarbons: alkanes (single bonds), alkenes (double), alkynes (triple). Functional groups define properties.
